name: DatePicker
description: DatePicker interactive guidance - date only, date and time, date range, and date range and time variants with calendar, month, year, and time views.

documentation.purpose: Used to select a date and time. The top date display area can be selected or the date can be entered.
guidance: Select date only - calendar, month, and year views with Back navigation.
Select date and time - time picker with AM/PM, hours, and minutes.
Select date range - start and end dates with in-range highlight.
Select date range and time - range plus time for active date.
The click range in the top area - segmented header hit areas; scale 1.5× or 2× if too small.
